name: 10-minute Shrimp Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the water to boiling in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Add the noodles and cook for about 3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until they are tender.
3. Stir in the contents of the seasoning packet, chopped green onion, julienne strips of carrot, and shrimp.
4. Cook until everything is hot.
5. Serve with soy sauce.
